resume.extracted_text:
SANKARSH PONNATH
: B.Tech, Mechanical Engineering, 2028
Course
: 10f31sankarsh@gmail.com
Email
: 9962955993
Mobile
LinkedIn : linkedin.com/in/sankarsh-ponnath
: github.com/sankarsh-ml
GitHub
: 8.56
CGPA
B.Tech Mechanical Engineering student at NIT Calicut with hands-on experience in AI/ML and full-stack software development. Built applied
AI systems spanning document fraud detection, computer vision, OCR, and deep learning, paired with FastAPI backends and React frontends.
Interested in AI/ML and software development roles, with a strong foundation in deployable model pipelines and end-to-end product design.
E DUCATION
National Institute of Technology Calicut (NITC)
Calicut, India
B.Tech Mechanical Engineering; CGPA: 8.56/10
2024 - 2028
Chennai Public School
Chennai, India
CBSE XII Computer Science: 96%; CBSE X: 94.2%
Graduated 2024
T ECHNICAL S KILLS
Languages: Python, C++, JavaScript, HTML, CSS
Machine Learning: Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/Keras, PyTorch, CNNs, EfficientNet, MobileNetV2, Logistic Regression
Computer Vision & OCR: OpenCV, PaddleOCR, ELA, Forgery Localization, Object Detection
Backend: FastAPI, Flask, REST APIs, Pydantic
Frontend: React.js, HTML/CSS
Databases & Tools: MongoDB, Git, GitHub, Linux, VS Code, Jupyter, Google Colab, Roboflow, Hugging Face
E XPERIENCE
NOVAC
Jun 2026 - Jul 2026
AI/Software Development Intern
Chennai, India
Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and
Python, supporting uploads, automated analysis, history tracking, result storage, and PDF report generation.
Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk
pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and
separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-
damage datasets to classify damage severity for insurance-claim assessment.
AI Hiring Platform (Resume-cum-Internship Bot): Built an AI-powered hiring platform with a FastAPI backend and React dashboard to
automate resume parsing, identity-document verification, and skill-based candidate scoring, integrating Hugging Face models and OCR to
extract and validate candidate data and rank applicants by skills, experience, and job relevance.
Google Developer Student Clubs (GDSC), NIT Calicut
Dec 2025 - Present
AI Member
Calicut, India
Working on a classroom energy optimization concept using occupancy and environmental patterns to identify inefficient energy use and
support data-driven, adaptive allocation of lighting and cooling resources.
Participate in AI/ML-focused technical discussions, workshops, and student-led project initiatives.
P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.
A CHIEVEMENTS & L EADERSHIP
Class Representative - Mechanical Engineering, NIT Calicut (Dec 2024 - Apr 2025).
Finalist, Big Fight 2026 Debate Competition - Debating Society, NIT Calicut.
Best Delegate, Srimutha MUN (2022) - Recognized for outstanding performance at a school-level Model United Nations conference.
Member, Montage - Filmmaking club of NIT Calicut; contributed to creative storytelling, script development, visual planning, and short-
form reels.
Member, Google Developer Student Club, NIT Calicut - AI/ML-focused technical engagement and projects.

Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and

Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk

AI Member
Calicut, India
Working on a classroom energy optimization concept using occupancy and environmental patterns to identify inefficient energy use and

P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and

Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk
pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and
separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-

Calicut, India

P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.

strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.

manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and

Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk

AI Member
Calicut, India
Working on a classroom energy optimization concept using occupancy and environmental patterns to identify inefficient energy use and

P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.
A CHIEVEMENTS & L EADERSHIP
Class Representative - Mechanical Engineering, NIT Calicut (Dec 2024 - Apr 2025).
Finalist, Big Fight 2026 Debate Competition - Debating Society, NIT Calicut.
Best Delegate, Srimutha MUN (2022) - Recognized for outstanding performance at a school-level Model United Nations conference.
Member, Montage - Filmmaking club of NIT Calicut; contributed to creative storytelling, script development, visual planning, and short-
form reels.
Member, Google Developer Student Club, NIT Calicut - AI/ML-focused technical engagement and projects.

Python, supporting uploads, automated analysis, history tracking, result storage, and PDF report generation.
Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk
pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and
separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-
damage datasets to classify damage severity for insurance-claim assessment.
AI Hiring Platform (Resume-cum-Internship Bot): Built an AI-powered hiring platform with a FastAPI backend and React dashboard to
automate resume parsing, identity-document verification, and skill-based candidate scoring, integrating Hugging Face models and OCR to
extract and validate candidate data and rank applicants by skills, experience, and job relevance.
Google Developer Student Clubs (GDSC), NIT Calicut
Dec 2025 - Present
AI Member
Calicut, India
Working on a classroom energy optimization concept using occupancy and environmental patterns to identify inefficient energy use and
support data-driven, adaptive allocation of lighting and cooling resources.
Participate in AI/ML-focused technical discussions, workshops, and student-led project initiatives.
P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.
A CHIEVEMENTS & L EADERSHIP
Class Representative - Mechanical Engineering, NIT Calicut (Dec 2024 - Apr 2025).

Member, Montage - Filmmaking club of NIT Calicut; contributed to creative storytelling, script development, visual planning, and short-
form reels.
Member, Google Developer Student Club, NIT Calicut - AI/ML-focused technical engagement and projects.

Projects
Cryptocurrency Blockchain Network Simulation - Python, Async Networking, Cryptography, IPFS
• Built a decentralized P2P blockchain with gossip-based peer discovery and transaction propagation.
• Implemented multiple consensus protocols including Proof of Work, Proof of Stake, and Proof of Authority.
• Developed asynchronous networking infrastructure using asyncio and WebSockets.
eXpOS - Operating System Implementation - Operating Systems, SPL, XSM Architecture
• Implemented an operating system from scratch on the XSM architecture.
• Developed process scheduling, memory management, system calls, interrupt handling, and file system support.
• Gained hands-on experience with OS internals, computer architecture, and low-level systems programming.
NITCbase Relational Database Management System - C++, DBMS, B+ Trees
• Implemented core components of a relational database management system following the NITCbase architecture.
• Developed buffer management, schema operations, caching, and record access modules.
• Implemented B+ Tree indexing and SQL-like operations on a simulated disk-based storage system.
Tetris Reinforcement Learning Agent - Python, PyTorch, Reinforcement Learning, D3QN
• Developed a custom Gym-compatible Tetris environment for reinforcement learning.
• Designed state representations using board features such as aggregate height, bumpiness, and holes.
• Trained and evaluated DQN-based agents including Dueling DQN and D3QN with Prioritized Experience Replay.
Achievements
• 3rd Place, Code.INIT() 2026 Hackathon - Developed Universal Link, a WebRTC-based communication platform with
AI-assisted sign language recognition; secured 3rd place among 40+ teams.
• Finalist, State-Level Debate Competition - Reached the finals of a state-level debate competition hosted by Christ
College of Engineering, Thrissur.

• Developed asynchronous networking infrastructure using asyncio and WebSockets.
eXpOS - Operating System Implementation - Operating Systems, SPL, XSM Architecture
• Implemented an operating system from scratch on the XSM architecture.
• Developed process scheduling, memory management, system calls, interrupt handling, and file system support.
• Gained hands-on experience with OS internals, computer architecture, and low-level systems programming.
NITCbase Relational Database Management System - C++, DBMS, B+ Trees
• Implemented core components of a relational database management system following the NITCbase architecture.
• Developed buffer management, schema operations, caching, and record access modules.
• Implemented B+ Tree indexing and SQL-like operations on a simulated disk-based storage system.
Tetris Reinforcement Learning Agent - Python, PyTorch, Reinforcement Learning, D3QN
• Developed a custom Gym-compatible Tetris environment for reinforcement learning.
• Designed state representations using board features such as aggregate height, bumpiness, and holes.
• Trained and evaluated DQN-based agents including Dueling DQN and D3QN with Prioritized Experience Replay.
Achievements
• 3rd Place, Code.INIT() 2026 Hackathon - Developed Universal Link, a WebRTC-based communication platform with
AI-assisted sign language recognition; secured 3rd place among 40+ teams.
• Finalist, State-Level Debate Competition - Reached the finals of a state-level debate competition hosted by Christ
College of Engineering, Thrissur.

AI systems spanning document fraud detection, computer vision, OCR, and deep learning, paired with FastAPI backends and React frontends.
Interested in AI/ML and software development roles, with a strong foundation in deployable model pipelines and end-to-end product design.

2024 - 2028
Chennai Public School
Chennai, India

Graduated 2024
T ECHNICAL S KILLS
Languages: Python, C++, JavaScript, HTML, CSS
Machine Learning: Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/Keras, PyTorch, CNNs, EfficientNet, MobileNetV2, Logistic Regression
Computer Vision & OCR: OpenCV, PaddleOCR, ELA, Forgery Localization, Object Detection
Backend: FastAPI, Flask, REST APIs, Pydantic
Frontend: React.js, HTML/CSS
Databases & Tools: MongoDB, Git, GitHub, Linux, VS Code, Jupyter, Google Colab, Roboflow, Hugging Face
E XPERIENCE
NOVAC
Jun 2026 - Jul 2026
AI/Software Development Intern
Chennai, India
Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and
Python, supporting uploads, automated analysis, history tracking, result storage, and PDF report generation.
Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk
pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and
separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-
damage datasets to classify damage severity for insurance-claim assessment.
AI Hiring Platform (Resume-cum-Internship Bot): Built an AI-powered hiring platform with a FastAPI backend and React dashboard to
automate resume parsing, identity-document verification, and skill-based candidate scoring, integrating Hugging Face models and OCR to
extract and validate candidate data and rank applicants by skills, experience, and job relevance.
Google Developer Student Clubs (GDSC), NIT Calicut
Dec 2025 - Present
AI Member
Calicut, India
Working on a classroom energy optimization concept using occupancy and environmental patterns to identify inefficient energy use and
support data-driven, adaptive allocation of lighting and cooling resources.
Participate in AI/ML-focused technical discussions, workshops, and student-led project initiatives.
P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.
A CHIEVEMENTS & L EADERSHIP
Class Representative - Mechanical Engineering, NIT Calicut (Dec 2024 - Apr 2025).
Finalist, Big Fight 2026 Debate Competition - Debating Society, NIT Calicut.
Best Delegate, Srimutha MUN (2022) - Recognized for outstanding performance at a school-level Model United Nations conference.
Member, Montage - Filmmaking club of NIT Calicut; contributed to creative storytelling, script development, visual planning, and short-
form reels.
Member, Google Developer Student Club, NIT Calicut - AI/ML-focused technical engagement and projects.

P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit

strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub

manual forward propagation and backpropagation.

confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.
A CHIEVEMENTS & L EADERSHIP
Class Representative - Mechanical Engineering, NIT Calicut (Dec 2024 - Apr 2025).
Finalist, Big Fight 2026 Debate Competition - Debating Society, NIT Calicut.
Best Delegate, Srimutha MUN (2022) - Recognized for outstanding performance at a school-level Model United Nations conference.
Member, Montage - Filmmaking club of NIT Calicut; contributed to creative storytelling, script development, visual planning, and short-
form reels.
Member, Google Developer Student Club, NIT Calicut - AI/ML-focused technical engagement and projects.

Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk
pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and
separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-

Calicut, India

Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a

manual forward propagation and backpropagation.

confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit

Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.

Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub

labeled news dataset.

manual forward propagation and backpropagation.

confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

manual forward propagation and backpropagation.

confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

projects.raw_text:
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

NOVAC
Jun 2026 - Jul 2026
AI/Software Development Intern
Chennai, India
Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and
Python, supporting uploads, automated analysis, history tracking, result storage, and PDF report generation.
Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-
damage datasets to classify damage severity for insurance-claim assessment.
AI Hiring Platform (Resume-cum-Internship Bot): Built an AI-powered hiring platform with a FastAPI backend and React dashboard to
automate resume parsing, identity-document verification, and skill-based candidate scoring, integrating Hugging Face models and OCR to
extract and validate candidate data and rank applicants by skills, experience, and job relevance.

Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

items.title: AI/Software Development Intern
items.description:
Chennai, India
Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and
Python, supporting uploads, automated analysis, history tracking, result storage, and PDF report generation.
Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-
damage datasets to classify damage severity for insurance-claim assessment.
AI Hiring Platform (Resume-cum-Internship Bot): Built an AI-powered hiring platform with a FastAPI backend and React dashboard to
automate resume parsing, identity-document verification, and skill-based candidate scoring, integrating Hugging Face models and OCR to
extract and validate candidate data and rank applicants by skills, experience, and job relevance.

AI Member
Calicut, India
Working on a classroom energy optimization concept using occupancy and environmental patterns to identify inefficient energy use and
support data-driven, adaptive allocation of lighting and cooling resources.
Participate in AI/ML-focused technical discussions, workshops, and student-led project initiatives.
P ROJECTS
Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib GitHub
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.
A CHIEVEMENTS & L EADERSHIP
Class Representative - Mechanical Engineering, NIT Calicut (Dec 2024 - Apr 2025).
Finalist, Big Fight 2026 Debate Competition - Debating Society, NIT Calicut.
Best Delegate, Srimutha MUN (2022) - Recognized for outstanding performance at a school-level Model United Nations conference.
Member, Montage - Filmmaking club of NIT Calicut; contributed to creative storytelling, script development, visual planning, and short-
form reels.
Member, Google Developer Student Club, NIT Calicut - AI/ML-focused technical engagement and projects.

Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit
systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare
strategy performance against benchmarks.
Fake News Classification using Neural Networks | Python, NumPy, NLP GitHub
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a
labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.
A CHIEVEMENTS & L EADERSHIP
Class Representative - Mechanical Engineering, NIT Calicut (Dec 2024 - Apr 2025).
Finalist, Big Fight 2026 Debate Competition - Debating Society, NIT Calicut.
Best Delegate, Srimutha MUN (2022) - Recognized for outstanding performance at a school-level Model United Nations conference.
Member, Montage - Filmmaking club of NIT Calicut; contributed to creative storytelling, script development, visual planning, and short-
form reels.
Member, Google Developer Student Club, NIT Calicut - AI/ML-focused technical engagement and projects.

Jun 2026 - Jul 2026
AI/Software Development Intern
Chennai, India
Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and
Python, supporting uploads, automated analysis, history tracking, result storage, and PDF report generation.
Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-
damage datasets to classify damage severity for insurance-claim assessment.
AI Hiring Platform (Resume-cum-Internship Bot): Built an AI-powered hiring platform with a FastAPI backend and React dashboard to
automate resume parsing, identity-document verification, and skill-based candidate scoring, integrating Hugging Face models and OCR to
extract and validate candidate data and rank applicants by skills, experience, and job relevance.

items.title: Quantitative Trading Backtester | C++, Python, pandas, matplotlib
items.description:
Built a modular C++ backtesting engine for rule-based trading strategies, including moving-average crossover and SMA-based entry/exit systems.
Implemented transaction costs, cooldown periods, stop-loss logic, trailing exits, and position sizing for realistic trade simulation.
Calculated total return, Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, and trade-level profit/loss; used Python to visualize equity curves and compare strategy performance against benchmarks.
Built a fake news classification pipeline from scratch using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on a labeled news dataset.
Hand-coded logistic regression and a fully connected neural network in raw NumPy - with no machine-learning libraries - implementing
manual forward propagation and backpropagation.
Tuned vocabulary size, feature scaling, and regularization; evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and
confusion matrices, with bigram/trigram features improving results.

Jun 2026 - Jul 2026
AI/Software Development Intern
Chennai, India
Fraudulent Document Detection: Built a full-stack AI fraud-detection platform for PDFs/images using React, FastAPI, MongoDB, and
Python, supporting uploads, automated analysis, history tracking, result storage, and PDF report generation.
Integrated PaddleOCR, ELA, MVSS-Net, TruFor, document-quality scoring, and custom rule-based logic into a unified document fraud-risk pipeline.
Improved system reliability and inference speed using model caching, shared preprocessing, PDF-to-image conversion tuning, and separated model environments.
Vehicle Damage Detection: Trained EfficientNetB0 and MobileNetV2 models via transfer learning on Roboflow and Kaggle vehicle-
damage datasets to classify damage severity for insurance-claim assessment.
AI Hiring Platform (Resume-cum-Internship Bot): Built an AI-powered hiring platform with a FastAPI backend and React dashboard to
automate resume parsing, identity-document verification, and skill-based candidate scoring, integrating Hugging Face models and OCR to
extract and validate candidate data and rank applicants by skills, experience, and job relevance.
